system.translate_notice: Quick question! Your Discord isn't set to English! okabot supports real-time automatic translations for some features, and it's available in your language! These are machine-translated, and may not be 100% accurate. Do you want to allow okabot to translate these compatible features for you?
system.translate_yes_final: Got it, I'll translate commands for you automatically!
system.translate_no_final: Got it, I'll just use the default English translations for you!

rules.title: okabot Rules
rules.desc: You must read and agree to these rules before using okabot (updated {{version}}). If this is suddenly appearing again, the rules have updated and you must agree to the new rules.

name.five: 5. No public discussion of achievement solutions

value.one: Any abuse of bugs or manipulation will cause your account to be irreversibly **reset without warning**. Alongside, you may potentially be banned from using okabot entirely.
value.two: Effortless gambling isn't fair to others. Don't use macros/scripts.
value.three: You are allowed one account and one account only for okabot.
value.four: You are prohibited from trading okash/items for real-world currencies or items in any other bot. Trading okash to trade items is OK.
value.five: I can't control what you do in your private chats, but please don't discuss achievement solutions publicly, that ruins the fun of figuring them out yourself!
value.disclaimer: By using okabot, you are consenting to having select data collected about you/your usage of okabot. This information may be linked to your Discord user ID or other identifying information. This information is not, and never will be, shared with third-parties. If this is not your first time using okabot, and you wish to have all data pertaining to your account deleted, please DM okabot "data deletion request" and the rest of the process can be handled from there.

rules.privacy: You can read about okabot's privacy policy at https://oka.bot/privacy
rules.agreed: You agreed to the rules! Thank you for using okabot! Have fun!
rules.agreed_text:
**{{name}}**, you've agreed to the rules! Have fun with okabot!
You can run this command again at any time to see the rules.
rules.already_agreed: You've already agreed to the okabot rules! Thanks!

interactions.okash:
{{cat_money}} **{{name}}**, you've got {{okash}} OKA**{{wallet}}** in your wallet.
Your bank balance is {{okash}} OKA**{{bank}}**.
There's currently {{okash}} OKA**{{fines}}** in the bank's fines.
